name: JCurve Solutions Limited
summary: JCurve Solutions Limited, a cloud technology company, provides enterprise resource planning (ERP) and telecommunications expense management solutions in Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, and the Philippines. The company offers JCurveERP, an ERP business software; cloud-based business management solutions software, including NetSuite and MYOB Advanced; and Riyo, development and sale of service management and scheduling software. It also provides telecommunication expense management software, such as JTel and Full Circle. In addition, the company offers implementation, training, support, accounting, audit, and consulting services. It primarily serves food and beverage, furniture and homewares, wholesale distribution, manufacturing, retail, and service industries, as well as construction and building suppliers, health and medical suppliers, and packaging suppliers. The company was formerly known as Stratatel Limited and changed its name to JCurve Solutions Limited in December 2013. JCurve Solutions Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.
